Text.Page: Pardon me, <PCNAME>, but may I ask you a favor?

Princess Arin ordered me to buy a specific pair of shoes, but no one had the ones she wanted. I borrowed them from Sujai instead, but now she wants them back.<NEXTPAGEBUTTON>"How can I help?"</NEXTPAGEBUTTON>

There's a vine outside that leads up to the terrace. Climb up there and give {@Creature:223#1042$$Sujai} the shoes before Arin notices they're gone.

Please?

Well, well! Isn't this odd. Why are you bringing me back my shoes?

Oh, I guess it doesn't matter. I just hope Merolyn enjoyed them.
